[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10001000 2
1 01101111 6
2 11011101 6
3 10101011 5
4 10111000 4
5 10111010 5
6 10100011 4
7 10001000 2

12 21 10111000 4 match 4
23 32 10100010 3
34 43 10000000 1
45 54 00001000 1
56 65 01001101 4
67 76 11010001 4
70 07 01010000 2

13 31 10100000 2

35 53 00100011 3

57 75 01100011 4
